title: phlox glaberrima subsp. interior
intro: Phlox glaberrima subsp. interior, also known as Interior Fragrant Phlox, is a subspecies of flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox glaberrima subsp. interior include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support immune function. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, and is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
